arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Borussia Dortmund: Live stream, Game time thread, How to watch
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. Bayern Munich was handed a loss in Europe and so has Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich trying to find “common ground” with Max Eberl before situation worsens
arts.sum: In case Eberl ended up leaving Bayern, Frankfurt’s Markus Krösche would be a serious candidate, as his work is appreciated by Bayern bosses. WIl Max Eberl have a brief tenure in Bayern Munich?

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — April 12th, 2025: What’s your prediction for Bayern Munich vs. Borussia Dortmund in Der Klassiker?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will host a desperate Borussia Dortmund side in Der Klassiker today...and the outcome of this match could play a key role in how each team views this season by the end of the campaign. The Bavarians are clinging to a lead in the league, while Borussia Dortmund is desperately trying to claw its way back into a top-four position — which seems like a longshot right now and will be even less likely if BVB falls to Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: Galatasaray still want to sign Sacha Boey from Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Galatasaray wanted to bring Sacha Boey back to the club on loan in January, but Bayern bosses - especially Christoph Freund - rejected the move to maintain the squad depth. When Sacha Boey was signed by Bayern Munich from Galatasaray for 30 million euros, it looked like a transfer that could have been a diamond in the rough.

arts.ttl: FREE STREAM: Watch Bayern vs Dortmund with our tactical cam!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich come into the latest edition of Der Klassiker with a six-point gap at the top the table and are aiming to retake their crown, following Bayer Leverkusen's successes last season.

arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayern Munich vs. Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich, Dayot Upamecano in “intensive talks”; Chelsea looking to unload two players linked to Bayern; Bundesliga clubs eyeing Bayern prospect; Manchester City wants FC Barcelona star; Bidding war for Dean Huijsen?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is reportedly among the teams interested in Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen, but if the Bavarians want the youngster, they will have to outbid Real Madrid, Arsenal FC, Chelsea FC, Liverpool FC, Newcastle United, and Tottenham Hotspur . Bayern Munich will host Borussia Dortmund in the Bundesliga for Der Klassiker where both teams are reeling from injuries and poor showings in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany dismisses lineup questions after Bayern Munich’s Champions League defeat
arts.sum: After Thomas Müller came on as a second half substitute for Bayern Munich in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals against Inter and scored an equalizer, it looked as if the Rekordmeister might just go on and score a winner before the final whistle, but that was not the case. In Bayern’s press conference ahead of Der Klassiker against Dortmund in the Bundesliga, Kompany was asked about his lineup selection for the first leg against Inter.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal, Tottenham keen on Bayern Munich's Kingsley Coman
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham are options to sign Bayern Munich's Kingsley Coman. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.
